D

damage - Variable in class un.caen.model.items.Weapon
 
DEFAULT_ENERGY - Static variable in class un.caen.config.Config
The default amount of energy for each player at the start of the game.
DEFAULT_ENERGYKIT_VALUE - Static variable in class un.caen.config.Config
The default value of an energy kit when collected.
DEFAULT_GUN_AMMO - Static variable in class un.caen.config.Config
The default amount of ammo for guns.
DEFAULT_MINE_COUNTDOWN - Static variable in class un.caen.config.Config
The default countdown time for mines (in seconds).
DEFAULT_WEAPONS_SIZE - Static variable in class un.caen.config.Config
The default number of weapons that each player starts with.
Direction - Enum in un.caen.util
The `Direction` enum defines the following eight directions: `UP` `DOWN` `LEFT` `RIGHT` `UP_LEFT` `UP_RIGHT` `DOWN_LEFT` `DOWN_RIGHT` These directions can be used to represent the movement of objects or characters in a game or simulation.
display() - Method in class un.caen.model.feild.Grid
Displays the current state of the grid in the console.
displayGameState(Player) - Method in class un.caen.view.ConsoleView
